abilities.description: Shackles the target to an enemy unit or tree in a line directly behind it. If no unit or tree is present, the stun duration is reduced to 0.6.
abilities.name: Shackleshot
abilities.story: Windranger's variety of bow skills includes an arrow with thick ropes attached to encumber any escaping target.

abilities.description: Windranger charges her bow for up to 1 second for a single powerful shot, which slows and deals more damage the longer it is charged. The arrow damages enemies along its path. For each enemy that Powershot hits, its damage and slow power is reduced.
abilities.name: Powershot
abilities.story: During her early years of training, Lyralei learned to fire powerful arrows that cleaved even trees to reach their targets on the other side.

abilities.description: Increases movement speed and adds evasion from all physical attacks.
abilities.name: Windrun
abilities.story: Lyralei enchants gusts of winds to flight incoming attacks.

abilities.description: Summons a strong wind that pushes all enemies in the target area towards the target direction. Vector Targeted.
abilities.name: Gale Force
abilities.story: At last Lyralei has learned to call upon the might of her true birthright.

abilities.description: Windranger channels the wind to gain 350/425/500 additional attack speed against a single enemy unit or structure, though with a reduction to her attack damage. Extra damage from secondary item effects is not reduced.
abilities.name: Focus Fire
abilities.story: Lyralei's ability to bombard opponents with a flurry of arrows is unparalleled - even at the expense of accuracy.

description: Fires swift flurry of arrows at a single target Born in the midst of a ruinous tempest, Lyralei has always been one with the Elemental Wind. Swift of foot, and true of aim, she Windruns across the battlefield, avoiding attacks as she draws a Powershot to pierce foes from a far. Armed with both quiver and rope, the Windranger binds enemies together with a handy Shackleshot. Honing her concentration, Lyralei launches a relentless sequence of arrows, Focus Firing on a single target until it resembles little more than an oversized pincushion.  Carry Support Disabler Escape Nuker  Cape, Cute, Female, Green, Nose Legs ( 2 )
trivia: In DotA, Windranger was known as "Alleria, the Windrunner". Alleria Windrunner is a character from the "Warcraft" universe. In the November 21, 2013 update, her name was changed to "Windranger", likely to avoid trademark issues with "Blizzard Entertainment".

hero_talents.talent_left: Focus Fire Kills Advance Cooldown by 18s.
